trivia: The longest CRJ pushed the Challenger-derived fuselage to 104 seats, and the market decided that was one stretch too far: only around 60 exist, concentrated in a few European and Asian fleets.
Rare type, few operators, predictable routes: a perfect example of how operator knowledge helps you hunt.
funFacts: The final and largest evolution of the CRJ line.
